data.content: Plan review: APPROVED. Verified all four source files (app-store.ts, url-state-sync.tsx, repo-switcher.tsx, use-update-url.ts). The plan correctly identifies the root cause (persistRepo(null) removes the key, making All Repositories indistinguishable from first-visit) and proposes a sound sentinel-based fix. Test strategy covers specific-repo restore, all-repos restore, and view param preservation. No invariants to check. Ready for implementation.
